name: Remoulade Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix mayonnaise and Durkee's Famous Sauce.
2. Gradually pour in olive oil while beating until the mixture resembles mayonnaise.
3. Add Creole or Poupon mustard and beat again.
4. Incorporate horseradish, ketchup, wine vinegar, Lea & Perrins, and Louisiana hot sauce one at a time, continuing to beat after each addition.
5. Use over shrimp on salad or as a sandwich sauce.
